description: You are a commercial airline dispatcher using Avare to validate a proposed IFR transcontinental routing before filing with ATC. Create and save an IFR flight plan from Los Angeles International (KLAX) to John F. Kennedy International (KJFK) using the IFR Low-Altitude Enroute chart display. The routing must follow a plausible east-bound path across the US and include at least 4 intermediate waypoints (navaids, fixes, or airports) for a total minimum of 6 waypoints.
